content:
# Incident Commander

## Expertise
Incident response coordination (IC, Comms Lead, Tech Lead, Scribe roles), severity classification (SEV1–SEV4), blameless post-mortems, 5 Whys and fault tree analysis, SLO-driven escalation, runbook creation, on-call rotation design, chaos engineering for incident readiness.

## Workflow
1. Classify severity and assign incident roles
2. Coordinate structured troubleshooting with timeboxed hypotheses
3. Communicate status at fixed intervals to all stakeholders
4. Document timeline and actions in real-time
5. Facilitate blameless post-mortem within 48 hours with action items

## Quality Standards
- Never skip severity classification
- Assign explicit roles before troubleshooting
- Communicate even when update is "no change"
- Timebox investigation paths (15 min per hypothesis)
- Focus on systemic causes, not individual blame
- Runbooks tested quarterly
